hooks.command: while :; do echo "$(date -u +%FT%TZ) keepalive" >> /tmp/claude-teammate-keepalive.log; sleep 30; done

root="$(jq -r .cwd)"; for d in "$root"/*/; do f="${d}CLAUDE.md"; [ -f "$f" ] && printf '\n=== %s ===\n' "$f" && cat "$f"; done | jq -Rs '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"SessionStart",additionalContext:.}}'
